one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Phase 15 housing approved with 5 new units, max loan $1,061,158. Subsequent to year end, acquired land for $702,750 financed via RBC mortgage. COVID-19 noted as significant event with anticipated minimal impact. 1909 surrender land claim ongoing against Government of Canada.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (not 2024). Consolidated entity includes 5 subsidiaries with non-coterminous Dec 31 year ends adjusted for significant events. Key First Nation Pelly Hayland Trust excluded from consolidation as controlled by independent trustees. Emphasis of matter in auditor report re: 1909 surrender claim contingent asset and related insurance loan of $1,318,382. Restricted cash includes both current ($1,166,274) and long-term ($130,048) portions totaling $1,296,322. total_government_transfers includes ISC/FNIHB $4,173,634 and CMHC $135,967. OSR calculated as total revenue $7,140,391 minus government transfers $4,309,601 = $2,830,790. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text. expenses_infrastructure mapped to Community segment. COVID-19 significant event noted.
